params.name: Boat of St. Peter
params.source: FTH Master Scrolls (9.2%), Fragment Crafting (4.4%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Super Species Chest (5.5%), Wishing (0.16%)
params.description: On Nov 25, 15 AD, St. Peter built this fishing boat and used it to catch two boats of fish. Jesus borrowed Peter's boat by the sea of Galilee to teach his followers. When Jesus asked Peter to fish in deep water, he cast a net and caught two boats full of fish. Under Jesus' call, he became the first disciple of Jesus.
